task.title: Decide and codify grouped multiline expression opener style
task.summary: The formatter currently rejoins grouped multiline expressions into shapes like `return ( $groups | each ...` and `( open --raw ...`, and the review found those results awkward but not structurally broken.
task.problem: This is a policy question rather than a correctness failure. We need a definitive answer on whether multiline grouped expressions should keep the opener on its own line or share a line with the first stage when the inside is clearly multiline.

acceptanceCriteria.criterion: Choose one formatter policy for clearly multiline grouped expressions introduced by `return (` and plain `(`.
Encode that policy in regression tests using the real fixture shapes from upgrade-workflows.nu, bootstrap.nu, and seed.nu.
Update docs or review notes so the chosen style is explicit instead of remaining a taste-based open question.
